reviews.comment:
Fuimos al restaurante y tenían poca variedad,  antes era mejor

(Translated by Google)
We went to the restaurant and they had little variety, it used to be better
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnc0xqaVFnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy linda estación. Se come rico, hamburguesas premium y facturas ,.aceptan tarjetas. Suele tener menos gente que las estaciones de medio de la ruta 2, por eso es más amigable para parar, ya que tiene un estacionamiento arbolado muy agradable.

(Translated by Google)
A very nice station. The food is delicious, including premium burgers and pastries. They accept credit cards. It's usually less crowded than the stations along Route 2, so it's more convenient for stopping, as it has a very pleasant, tree-lined parking lot.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnOTUzeVRnEAE

reviews.comment:
Lugar más abierto, arbolado y espacioso para detenerse en la Autovía 2. Buen servicio de bar para comer y tomar cafe, vamos y estación de servicio.

(Translated by Google)
More open, wooded and spacious place to stop on Highway 2. Good bar service for food and coffee, and a gas station.
